purpose: Stores optional user recent-search context for quick search restoration.

important_fields.name: user_id
important_fields.note: Owner of the recent search history entry.

important_fields.name: radius_km
important_fields.note: Restores nearby search context when present.

important_fields.name: filters_json
important_fields.note: Serialized filter selections used in restoration.

important_fields.name: searched_at
important_fields.note: Used for most-recent-first ordering and retention rules.

notes: Collapse duplicates by moving existing context to newest position.
Apply bounded retention (for example, top N entries per user).
